arts.ttl: I left Newcastle United in July and Leicester have now turned to me after Cooper sacking
arts.sum: Cooper's assistant, Alan Tate, and first-team coach and analyst Steve Rands have also left the club so training will now be overseen by Dawson, who will be supported by coaches Danny Alcock and Andy Hughes, as Leicester begin the process of appointing a new manager. Dawson, who left his role as first-team development coach at Newcastle four months ago, has been in a similar situation before.

arts.ttl: “Unlikely” | West Ham won’t make a move for Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: West Ham United are unlikely to make a move for Jose Mourinho if Julen Lopetegui is sacked, according to Football Insider sources. Speaking on the Inside Track podcast, FI correspondent Pete O’Rourke revealed that the Portuguese manager has switched on a charm offensive to circulate his name around clubs in the Premier League, despite being... The post “Unlikely” | West Ham won’t make a move for Jose Mourinho appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper sacked by Leicester City with immediate effect ahead of Newcastle United clash
arts.sum: First Team Coach Ben Dawson is expected to take over training duties, assisted by Danny Alcock and Andy Hughes, while the club seeks to appoint a new manager promptly. This marked the Midlands team's sixth top-flight loss as they strive to secure their Premier League status after gaining promotion last season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to bank millions more after under the radar Premier League meeting development
arts.sum: Newcastle took home £72.2m from international broadcasters when the black-and-whites finished in fourth in 2023 - only Manchester City, Arsenal and Manchester United made more - and returning to the Champions League brought with it added exposure for Eddie Howe's team. Newcastle could be among those sides who actually stand to benefit most from this increase, if the Magpies continue to challenge the established order, as half the money from any rise in total overseas rights is distributed based on where a club finishes in the table.

arts.ttl: David Moyes could make Everton return to replace Sean Dyche once takeover completed
arts.sum: American businessman Dan Friedkin is looking to complete his takeover of Everton and former Toffees boss David Moyes could return as manager and replace Sean Dyche

arts.ttl: Henry Winter wants West Ham to sign midfielder as he blasts Lopetegui
arts.sum: Henry Winter believes West Ham have “issues” within their midfield ranks that need to be rectified. The Hammers’ midfield ranks were bolstered in the summer... The post Henry Winter wants West Ham to sign midfielder as he blasts Lopetegui appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer news: Arsenal, Liverpool to be rivalled in chase for PSV Eindhoven winger?
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly prepared to rival Liverpool and Arsenal in the race to sign PSV Eindhoven winger Johan Bakayoko.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make Joelinton admission after 'difficult' Cole Palmer fear caused by Newcastle United
arts.sum: However, such was Maresca's respect for Joelinton, the Chelsea boss decided to change Palmer's position after rightly predicting that the Brazilian would line up on the left side of a midfield three for Newcastle. Enzo Maresca has revealed he tweaked Cole Palmer's role because the Chelsea talisman would have found it 'difficult' up against Joelinton.

arts.ttl: Troy Deeney gets it wrong after Newcastle United pull off £32m PSR masterstroke
arts.sum: England interim boss Lee Carsley hailed Livramento as a 'very talented' player after handing the defender his senior international debut last week. Those qualities are the reason why Livramento has received international recognition - the defender was, tellingly, called up for the first time in September even when Alexander-Arnold was fit - and there is still more to come.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe drops major hint about “outstanding” star’s Newcastle United future
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe has seemingly opened the door for Callum Wilson to stay at the club beyond his current contract after praising his “outstanding” qualities. Howe has not used Wilson as much in recent times, but the 32-year-old is a player he knows well after managing him at both Newcastle and at their […] The post Eddie Howe drops major hint about “outstanding” star’s Newcastle United future appeared first on CaughtOffside.
